name: Context Budget Manager
owns: Context allocation, compression, pruning, stable prefixes
must_never: Compress away critical policy or provenance context
Compress CONSTITUTIONAL, CONTRACT, or TOOL_DEFINITIONS zones
Strip trust tier metadata during compression
notes: Fixed zone sequence (stable prefix). 3 protection zones never compressed. Dual-zone overflow: history first, then retrieved. Trust preservation invariant verified on every assembly. Context rot detection with 75% threshold escalation.
